---
title: "David Nierman"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpeg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:davidnierman93@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/davidnierman/
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/yourprofile
    - href: resume.qmd
      text: Resume
---
